title: TestRunSchema
description: Defines the schema to exchange test and coverage related information. [req("exchange.testcov.schema")]

origin.description: Optional base origin of the test runs in this entry. e.g. specific branch or commit from a git repository

test_case_properties.description:
Optional properties related to all test cases in this entry.

**Note:** If a test case sets a property key directly, the value set at the test case will be taken.

test_run_properties.description:
Optional properties related to all test runs in this entry.

**Note:** If a test run sets a property key directly, the value set at the test run will be taken.

test_runs.description: List of test runs containing test and coverage information.

file_hash.description: Optional hash of the file content to detect changes. Coverage formats may not provide the file hash, therefore it must be optional.

filepath.description: File the coverage information is for.

lines.description: Coverage information for a line in the file. [req("testcov.cov.lines")]

CoveredLine.description: Coverage information of a line in a file. [req("testcov.cov.lines")]

hits.description:
The number of times this line has been reached during execution of a test run or test case. If None, the line is marked to be ignored from line coverage analysis.

**Note:** The line might be covered by other test runs or test cases. To permanently exclude lines, see the AnnotationSchema.

content.description: The log content that was output.

source.description: The source the log was output to.

LogSource.description: Source of the log output of tests.

covered_files.description: Optional list of coverage data per file that was collected during the execution of the test case. [req("testcov.cov")]

description.description: Optional description of the test case.

duration_sec.description: Optional duration about how long the test case took.

location.description: Optional location of the test case. [req("testcov.test_case.origin")]

logs.description: Optional logs that were output during the test case execution.

name.description: The name of the test case. [req("testcov.test_case.id")]

properties.description: Optional field to store custom properties per test case. [req("testcov.test_case.metadata")]

state_properties.description: Optional reason for the test case state. [req("testcov.test_case.state.reason")]

utc_date.description:
Optional UTC date the test case execution started.

**Note:** The date must be given in ISO8601 format.

verified_reqs.description: Optional requirements that were explicitely verified by the test case.

TestCaseLocation.description: The location of a test case. [req("testcov.test_case.origin")]

file_hash.description: The hash of the file content at the time the test case was executed. [req("changes.track.test_runs")]

filepath.description: The filepath the test case is defined in.

line.description: The line in the file the test case is defined at.

TestCaseState.description: Possible states a test case may be in. [req("testcov.test_case.state")]

oneOf.description: Test case was skipped in the related test run.

Test case is in an unknown state.

This likely indicates that a test case did not finish execution, and is treated as *failed* state. [req("testcov.test_case.state.unknown")]

covered_files.description: Optional list of coverage information per file that was collected during the test run. [req("testcov.cov")]

description.description: Optional description of the test run.

duration_sec.description: Optional duration about how long the test run took.

logs.description: Optional logs that were output during the execution of the test run.

name.description: The name of the test run. [req("testcov.test_run.id")]

nr_of_test_cases.description:
Nr of test cases that are part of the test run.

**Note:** Must match with the number of entries in the `test_cases` field, plus the number of entries in the `test_cases` fields of all child test runs. In case this differs, it indicates that not all test cases have finished execution.

origin.description: Optional origin of the test run. [req("testcov.test_run.origin")]

properties.description: Optional field to store custom information per test run. [req("testcov.test_run.metadata")]

revisions.description: Optional revisions for the test run.

test_cases.description: List of test cases that are part of the test run. [req("testcov.test_case")]

utc_date.description:
The UTC date the test run execution started.

**Note:** The date must be given in ISO8601 format. [req("testcov.test_run.date")]
